title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: openssl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for openssl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: OpenSSL is a toolkit that implements the Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) and Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocols, as well as a full-strength general-purpose cryptography library.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Setting first TLS group to an unsupported one yields an empty key share [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131010)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: Setting first TLS group to an unsupported one yields an empty key share [rhel-9.7.z]

full_text:
An update for openssl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

OpenSSL is a toolkit that implements the Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) and Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocols, as well as a full-strength general-purpose cryptography library.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Setting first TLS group to an unsupported one yields an empty key share [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131010)
